speaker: Seeker
text: Main ruk nahi sakta, client contract cancel ho gaya aur ghar ka poora bojh mere kandhe par aa gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty frame mirror karna, Lens B se zimmedari ka bhar pakadna.
text: Yeh pressure kisi ko bhi hila de, aur tum phir bhi farz pe khade ho. Tumhe lag raha hai rukna mana hai kyunki bacche aur ghar ki zimmedari seedha tum par tikki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Papa ne kisan hokar jo savings coaching mein lagayi thi, uske baad main ruk nahi sakta, warna unka bharosa toot jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational load mirror karna, Lens C se parivaar ki umeed reflect karna.
text: Itna saara bojh akela uthana bahut bhaari hota hai. Tumhare liye yeh sirf kaam nahi, Papa ki mehnat aur parivaar ka bharosa sambhalna bhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Roz 15 ghante kaam kar raha hoon, machine ki tarah chalna hai, warna paise ka flow ruk jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duration mirror karna, Lens D se long-haul thakan ko naam dena.
text: Pichhle kai dino se lagataar 15 ghante chalna tumhe andar se nichod raha hai, phir bhi tum engine band nahi kar paa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach bolun to body toot rahi hai, par main ruk nahi sakta kyunki bacche ka kharcha mahine ke end tak nikalna hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feared consequence mirror karna, Lens E se girne ka darr hold karna.
text: Tumhe darr hai ki agar ek din bhi pace gira, to seedha bacche ke kharche aur ghar ki izzat par asar padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mohalle mein sab bolte hain UPSC chhod ke business kiya to prove karo, isliye lagta hai bas endure karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke shabdon se rooted ek sawal puchkar sabse bhaari pressure point nikalna.
text: Jab yeh prove karne ka pressure sabse tez hota hai, us waqt tumhare andar sabse pehle kya tootne lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse pehle neend toot gayi hai, fir gussa andar daba rehta hai, par main ruk nahi sakta bolke laptop khol deta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty + pattern mirror karna, Lens B se autopilot ka cycle reflect karna.
text: Neend tootne aur gussa dabne ke baad bhi tum duty mode on karke kaam pe baith jaate ho, jaise khud ko break dena allowed hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, asli conflict yahi hai ki bacche ke saath rehna chahta hoon, par ghar chalana hai to screen pe hi chipka rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core conflict sunke unexpressed emotion ko culturally-fit tareeke se reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahar se strong dikh rahe ho, lekin andar gehri exhaustion aur dono taraf fail hone ka darr ek saath chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, gaon mein log turant bol dete hain beta fail ho gaya, isliye lagta hai izzat bani rehni chahiye chahe main andar se khali ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hindi Belt reality ko validate karke worth ko outcome se alag karna.
text: Hindi belt ke izzat-pressure mein yeh feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Contract cancel hona ya business ka jhatka tumhari keemat decide nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad isi wajah se main har baar main ruk nahi sakta repeat karta rehta hoon, warna guilt bahut tez ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke world se ek systemic pattern normalise karna bina solution diye.
text: UPSC se business shift karne walon mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai weakness dikh gayi to izzat gir jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke halka laga, par phir bhi lagta hai farz nibhana hai aur pace dheema karne se darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Employment shock ko structural frame dena taaki self-blame kam ho.
text: Aise contract-loss phase mein chhote business walon ko cashflow jhatka aana system level pattern hota hai, yeh tumhari mehnat ki kami ka proof nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo aaj hi ho sake aur kaam bhi na toote?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty-compatible 3 chhote options dena jo 10 minute ke andar ho sake.
text: Abhi teen chhote options lo: pehla, 8 minute mein kal call karne ke liye top 2 purane clients ko short message draft karo; doosra, 7 minute baby ke saath bina phone baitho taaki guilt ka pressure halka ho; teesra, 5 minute mein aaj ki earning-gap number likh do, bas estimate level par.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe pehla aur teesra practical lag raha hai, par raasta chahiye jisse panic wapas na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion ko step-by-step todkar immediate action start karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo aur do purane clients ke naam likho. Phir unko ek line bhejo: 'Kal 10 min call le sakte ho? ek urgent project discuss karna hai.' Bas bhejne ke baad 5 minute earning-gap ka rough number likh do, itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh steps clear hain, thoda control aa raha hai aur panic utna sharp nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress validate karke self-worth ko daily result se alag rakhna.
text: Aaj tumne pressure ke beech direction pakdi, yeh chhoti baat nahi. Ek din ka contract ya loss tumhari provider value ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, mujhe bas pace sambhalna hai bina tootey, warna fir wahi guilt cycle start ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: No-extra-obligation micro-options dena jisse pace stable rahe.
text: Pace stable rakhne ke liye do micro options: har 2 ghante baad 2 minute seedha khade hokar saans normal karo; aur har raat bas 3-line ka 'kal ka pehla kaam' note banao, full plan nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye manageable hai, especially 3-line note wala, isse dimaag halka reh sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Cashflow volatility ko normalise karke panic ko personal failure se alag karna.
text: Early-stage service business mein month-end swings normal hote hain, isliye har dip ko apni capability ka verdict mat mano; yeh market rhythm ka part hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab sambhal sakta hoon lag raha, kam se kam next 24 ghante ka clear frame ban gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ko reinforce karna aur duty ko sustainable pace se jodna.
text: Jo clarity tumne banayi hai, wahi tumhari strength hai. Farz nibhana matlab bina ruke jalna nahi, balki tikau pace mein chalna bhi hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ruk nahi sakta wali line ab bhi hai, par ab uska matlab panic nahi, steady rehna lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Anchor phrase ko healthy reframe ke saath do short practices dena.
text: Us line ko naya anchor bana lo: 'rukna nahi, par tootna bhi nahi.' Iske liye aaj se do cheezein rakho - subah pehla client-task 10 minute, raat ko bacche ke saath 7 minute phone-free.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye fit baithta hai, duty bhi chalti rahegi aur guilt bhi kam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Cultural pressure ke beech intentional choices ko validate karna.
text: Izzat aur zimmedari ke pressure ke beech tumne soch samajh kar raasta nikala, yeh bahut mature step hai. Tumhari keemat sirf income graph se nahi banti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye clear hoon - do messages, earning-gap note, aur baby ke saath 7 minute.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Session close ke liye concise checklist dekar follow-through easy banana.
text: Perfect close checklist: abhi messages bhejo, phir gap note karo, aur sone se pehle 7 minute baby-time lock karo. Bas aaj ka kaam itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, mujhe kal ke liye tayyar feel ho raha hai aur sir pe bhaar pehle se kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Conversation ko grounded confidence aur continuity ke saath close karna.
text: Aaj tumne pressure ko ignore nahi kiya, usko structure diya - yeh real progress hai. Isi steady tareeke se chalo, tumhara system aur tumhara parivaar dono ko sahara milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty frame mirror karna, Lens B se dharam-line ka weight pakadna.
text: Tumne apne aap ko pehle farz wali seat par bitha diya hai, isliye bacche ko chhod kar bhi kaam uthana lagta hai zaroori.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai
text: Multi-year prep ke baad yahi aakhri umeed lagi hai, isliye exhaustion ignore karke bas chal raha hoon, warna ghar ka scene aur bigad jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Time horizon mirror karna, Lens D se lamba prep-load reflect karna.
text: Kaafi saal se tum ek hi race mein lage hue ho, aur ab bhi tumhe lagta hai rukna matlab poori mehnat bekaar ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kirana shop ka udhaar upar latka hai, isliye raat ko bhi screen khol leta hoon, guilt tab aati hai jab bacha uth ke dekhta hai main busy hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational mirror karna, Lens C se bache ki nazar ka bojh dikhana.
text: Bacche ki nazar mein tum busy dikhte ho, aur tumhare andar yeh baat khaati rehti hai ki kaam kyun pehle aa gaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai
text: Haan, par pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai, isliye bache se doori ka guilt secondary lagta hai, pehla number udhaar aur EMI jaisa pressure hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad ek grounded sawal se core darr nikalna.
text: Jab tum night shift jaisa kaam karte ho, sabse zyada kis cheez ka darr tumhe tight pakadta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr yahi hai ki agar coaching institute ke projects ruk gaye toh kirana wala scene aur coaching wala proof dono ek saath collapse ho jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feared consequence mirror karna, Lens E se double-collapse fear hold karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ek slip par ghar ka udhaar aur career wali umeed dono ek saath gir sakte hain, isliye tum khud ko pause nahi dete.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai
text: Bilkul, isliye dil mein bolta rehta hoon ki pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai, chahe neend toot jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty mirror karna, Lens B se neend sacrifice reflect karna.
text: Neend todne tak jaana tumhare liye normal ho gaya hai, kyunki tumne farz ko apni pehli saans maan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Asli conflict yahi hai ki main bache ke paas rehna chahta hoon, par udhaar aur nearly closed business mujhe content grind pe laake khada kar dete hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 aur Duty_Based par exhaustion reflect karna, guilt ke neeche ki thakan dikhana.
text: Lagta hai tumhare andar gehri exhaustion jam gayi hai, par guilt itna loud hai ki tumhe lagta hai bacche ke paas rehna luxury hai jo abhi afford nahi kar sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dharam bol ke khud ko justify kar leta hoon, par andar pata hai bacche ko papa busy hi dikhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hindi Belt kirana-udhaar pressure validate karke worth outcome se alag karna.
text: Kirana udhaar aur coaching hustle ke beech aisa guilt feel karna bilkul samajhne layak hai. Tumhari parenthood value sirf is week ke deliverables se count nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai, phir bhi exhaustion ignore karke chalna padta hai kyunki business nearly closed hai aur ghar ka flow rukna nahi chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Coaching-kirana dual load wale circle ka silent pattern normalize karna.
text: Coaching content freelancers ke beech yeh pattern bahut common hai, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai rukna matlab parivaar ka udhaar aur izzat dono risk mein aa jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon jo aaj hi ho jaye aur extra load na badhe, bas clear steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par teen chhote duty-compatible options dena.
text: Teen quick options: (1) 8 minute mein kirana wale ko partial payment date ka short message likho, (2) 7 minute baby ke saath floor time bina phone, (3) 5 minute mein coaching deliverable ka sirf next chunk title likh do. Jo sabse light lage woh pick karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka
text: Pehla aur teesra pick karunga, par kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka panic dubara na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek flow ko step-by-step todna taaki turant start ho.
text: Pehle udhaar wale ko ek line message: '15 tarikh tak partial bhejunga, aaj amount final kar raha hoon.' Phir notes mein next content chunk ka title likho, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh steps clear hain, thoda control aa raha hai aur guilt kam sharp lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 employment volatility ko structural frame dena, personal blame kam karna.
text: Coaching content market mein project gaps aur payment delays common rhythm hain, har gap tumhari mehnat ka final verdict nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe pace sambhalni hai bina tootey, warna fir wahi bacche se doori wala guilt loop start ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Agency validate karke farz ko sustainable pace se jodna.
text: Jo clarity tumne abhi banayi hai wahi tumhari strength hai. Ek slow week tumhare dharam ko khatam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye manageable hai, 3-line note se dimaag halka reh sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Bina nayi zimmedari ke micro pacing options dena.
text: Micro pacing: har 2 ghante baad 2 minute seedha khade hokar paani piyo, aur raat ko sirf 3-line 'kal ka pehla kaam' likho, poora blueprint nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh gaya, main theek hona chahta hoon is flow mein, warna baby ke saath guilt rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chhota baby-window guilt ko duty-compatible tareeke se halka karna.
text: Saat minute ka fixed baby-floor time rakhna farz ko kamzor nahi, ghar ko stable karta hai. Tumhari value sirf content slides se count nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai
text: Haan, pehle mujhe ghar chalane ka apna dharam nibhana hai wali line ab panic ki jagah remind kar rahi hai ki stable rehna bhi responsibility hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Anchor phrase ko healthy frame ke saath chhote anchors dena.
text: Us line ko naya matlab do: 'rukna nahi, par tootna bhi nahi.' Aaj se subah pehla content-task 10 minute aur shaam ko baby ke saath 7 minute phone-free rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye fit baithta hai, udhaar chase bhi chalega aur guilt bhi kam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intentional micro-steps ko culturally validate karna.
text: Udhaar aur coaching ke beech tumne realistic anchors choose kiye, yeh mature step hai. Tumhari keemat sirf is sprint ke output se nahi banti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, aaj ke liye clear hoon: udhaar message, chunk title, aur baby ke saath 7 minute.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Session close ke liye concise checklist dena.
text: Mini close: abhi message bhejo, phir chunk title note karo, aur sone se pehle 7 minute baby-time lock karo. Bas aaj ka wrap itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, kal ke liye tayyar feel ho raha hai aur sir pe bhaar pehle se kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karke continuity dena.
text: Jo tumne aaj structure banaya hai wahi tumhari stability ka seed hai. Udhaar waqt badal sakta hai, tumhara intent nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal agar guilt spike ho toh batao kya karoon - wahi 3-line note repeat kar lu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Session ko grounded confidence ke saath band karna.
text: Haan, guilt spike par pehle wahi 3-line note repeat karna safe anchor hai. Aaj tumne guilt ko ignore nahi kiya, uske saath workable plan banaya, yeh real progress hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta
text: main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta, aaj client contract loss ke baad dimaag fatne ko hai par PSC aspirant wali survive karne ki aadat on kar di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty frame mirror karna, Lens B se haar-na-manne wali zid pakadna.
text: Tumne khud ko yeh rule de rakha hai ki thak kar bhi haar allowed nahi, isliye contract loss ke baad bhi survival mode auto on ho gaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta
text: Poora khandaan umeed se dekhta hai, isliye main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta, warna ghar ka mahaul aur bigad jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Structural endurance hi meri kismat lag gayi hai, month-end pe ghar paise bhejne ki chinta bacche ki muskurahat se zyada loud hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Time mirror karna, Lens D se month-end pressure reflect karna.
text: Mahine ke aakhri din tumhare liye sirf date nahi, poora ghar ka pulse ban jata hai, isliye bacche ki muskurahat peeche chhod jati lagti hai.
